title: Extrusion and/or pultrusion device and method
abstract: An extrusion- or pultrusion device for forming a profile product in a production direction comprising a rotating die having two opposite first and second side walls and an outer circumferential surface there between, wherein the rotating die comprises a first side portion in connection to the first side wall and a second side portion in connection to the second side wall and a mid-portion extending between the first and second side portions, wherein the first and/or second side portions comprises an recess extending in a radial direction with an extension being less than a radial extension of at least a part of the mid-portion.
claims: 1. An extrusion- and/or pultrusion device for forming a profile product in a production direction, said device comprising: a rotating die, extending in a radial direction and a width direction, having two opposite first and second side walls and an outer circumferential surface extending in the width direction there between, wherein the rotating die comprises a first side portion in connection to the first side wall and a second side portion in connection to the second side wall and a mid-portion extending between the first and second side portions,
